framework.name: Parallel Between Human Marketplaces and Agent Coordination Platforms
framework.description: The trust mechanisms used in human peer-to-peer marketplaces (reputation, verification, communication protocols, capability disclosure) map directly to needs in agent-to-agent marketplaces: capability attestation, agent reputation systems, negotiation protocols, service discovery. The architectural patterns are identical even though the actors differ.
